description: Live run-tool E2E tool list for the CSG Tools extension. Driven by tests/e2e/run_tool_e2e.py from the e2e-godot CI leg against a connected headless editor + a local gamedev-mcp-server. Each entry is one real assertion: a regression in the tool turns the CI leg red.
notes: The six editor tools (box/sphere/cylinder/combiner create, set-operation, get) resolve nodes relative to the edited scene root, so the 'setup' phase opens a scene first via the core godot_mcp 'scene-create' tool. csg-defaults is pure-managed and needs no scene. Assertions target the extension-PRODUCED structured fields (Kind, Operation, clamped scalars) NOT TypeName, because Node.GetClass() returns Godot's upper-case engine name (CSGBox3D) which differs from the C# binding casing. The 'expect' substrings are matched against godot-cli's compact --raw JSON.
